info.title: Credentials API
info.description: Returns list of Credential sets matching filter criteria.

get.description:
Returns list of Credentials matching filter criteria. The response contains “cursor_next” field, which should be provided to the next subsequent call to fetch potential next page of the results. Results are sorted by ascending order of the last_updated_ts field.
Two indications of the end of the stream are possible: the result list is empty or its size is less than the requested items count.

parameters.name: credential_set_name
parameters.description: Search by credential set name.

parameters.name: credential_set_id
parameters.description: Search by credential set id.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Search by credential domain(detection domain).

parameters.name: affiliation_group
parameters.description: Possible values: my_employees, my_customers, third_parties, vip_emails

parameters.name: password_strength
parameters.description: Possible values: excellent, strong, medium, weak, poor, not_provided

parameters.name: password_length_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_lowercase_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_uppercase_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_numbers_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_punctuation_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_symbols_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_separators_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_other_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_entropy_gte
parameters.description: Must be greater than or equal to 0

parameters.name: password_plain
parameters.description: Must be URL encoded

parameters.name: credential_login
parameters.description: Search by credential login.

parameters.name: detected_malware
parameters.description: Search by credential detected malware. For example: agent_tesla, Lumma, VIDAR

parameters.name: girs
parameters.description: Filter results by custom GIRs (General Intelligence Requirements), my_girs or company_pirs. Using multiple values will return results based on the aggregated GIR list

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds)

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds)

parameters.name: last_updated_from
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds) or period e.g. 24hours or 7days

parameters.name: last_updated_until
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds) or period e.g. 24hours or 7days

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Range is: [1, 1000]

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Continue scrolling from cursor

get.description:
Returns list of Credential occurrences matching filter criteria. Stream pagination is based on a cursor. The response is the same as for the /credentials/occurrences endpoint but with the additional “cursorNext” field. Results are sorted by ascending order of the lastUpdated field.
Two indications of the end of the stream are possible: the result list is empty or its size is less than the requested items count.

Returns list of Credential sets accessed urls matching filter criteria. The response contains “cursor_next” field, which should be provided to the next subsequent call to fetch potential next page of the results. Results are sorted by ascending order of the last_updated_ts field.
Two indications of the end of the stream are possible: the result list is empty or its size is less than the requested items count.

get.description: Returns a single Credential occurrence matching requested ID.

get.description: Returns a single Credential matching requested ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the credential

get.description: Returns a single Credential set matching requested ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the credential set

first_seen_ts.description: Start of the credential activity range.

last_seen_ts.description: End of the credential activity range.

girs.description: General Intelligence Requirements that match the credential.

affiliations.description: Affiliation of the credential. Allowed values: my_employees, vip_emails, my_customers, third_parties.

credential_sets.description: Credential sets associated with the credential.

credential_set_type.description: Type(s) of the credential set(s) this credential belongs to.

lowercase.description: The number of lowercase letters in the password.

uppercase.description: The number of uppercase letters in the password.

numbers.description: The number of digits in the password.

symbols.description: The number of symbols in the password.

punctuation_marks.description: The number of punctuation marks in the password.

separators.description: The number of separators in the password.

other.description: The number of other characters in the password.

strength.description: Password strength. Allowed values: excellent, strong, medium, weak, poor, not_provided.

CredSetAccessedUrlDataResponse.description: Credential set accessed URL with related objects.

affiliations.description: Affiliation of the credential. Allowed values: my_employees, vip_emails, my_customers, third_parties.

credential_type.description: Type of the credential set this credential belongs to.

cursor_next.description: Stream position identifier to continue scrolling from
Stream position identifier to continue scrolling from

id.description: Unique credential set accessed url identifier.

last_updated_ts.description: Credential set accessed url last modification date.
